breakingChangesNotes: Removed the obj_ext_browser argument from the anyrun-detonate-url-android command and from the ANYRUN Detonate Url Android playbook. Android detonation does not support browser selection via the API. Custom playbooks or automations that pass this argument to anyrun-detonate-url-android or use it as an input to the ANYRUN Detonate Url Android playbook must be updated to remove it.
